home.title: RCONS — Audit & Consulting
home.description: Professional audit and consulting firm. IFRS and RSBU audit, tax consulting.

about.title: About Us
about.description: History, team and values of RCONS. Experience, licenses and professional standards.

contacts.title: Contacts
contacts.description: Address, phone and email of RCONS. Contact form for inquiries.

resources.title: Documents & Resources
resources.description: Official documents, SRO certificates, disclosure and auditor qualifications.

documents.title: Internal Documents
documents.description: Accounting policies, quality standards and internal regulations.

sro.title: SRO Membership
sro.description: Certificate of membership in the self-regulatory organization of auditors.

disclosure.title: Information Disclosure
disclosure.description: Mandatory disclosure of information per audit legislation.

audit.title: Audit
audit.description: Audit services under Russian and international standards.

rsbu.title: RSBU Audit
rsbu.description: Audit of financial statements under Russian accounting standards.

mandatory.title: Statutory Audit
mandatory.description: Mandatory audit for organizations required by legislation.
mandatory.content: Statutory audit is conducted for joint-stock companies, credit organizations and other entities per the Federal Law on Auditing.

initiative.title: Voluntary Audit
initiative.description: Voluntary audit at the initiative of management or owners.
initiative.content: Voluntary audit is conducted by decision of owners or management to obtain independent assessment of financial statement reliability.

express.title: Express Audit
express.description: Rapid review to identify key risks quickly.
express.content: Express audit — quick assessment of accounting and reporting to identify critical errors in a short timeframe.

ifrs.title: IFRS Audit
ifrs.description: Audit and transformation of financial statements under IFRS.

audit.title: IFRS Financial Statement Audit
audit.description: Independent audit of financial statements prepared in accordance with IFRS.
audit.content: IFRS audit is required for companies with foreign investors, those accessing international capital markets or part of international groups.

transformation.title: Financial Statement Transformation
transformation.description: Conversion of financial statements from RSBU to IFRS.
transformation.content: Transformation from RSBU to IFRS includes analysis of differences, adjustment of balance sheet items, and preparation of disclosures.

tax.title: Tax Consulting
tax.description: Tax planning, optimization and support during tax audits.

consulting.title: Tax Consulting
consulting.description: Comprehensive tax planning and tax burden reduction services.

opt.title: Tax Optimization
opt.description: Legal methods of reducing tax burden: tax system selection, benefits, structuring.
opt.content: Tax optimization — application of legal tools to reduce the tax burden: choosing the optimal taxation system, using benefits, smart business structuring.

hero.title: Audit and Consulting for Your Business
hero.subtitle: Professional audit services, tax consulting and financial analysis
